params.name: First World Cup Ticket
params.description:
On Jul 30, 1930 AD, the first World Cup was held at the Century Stadium in Uruguay.
The first World Cup was held in Uruguay. A total of 13 teams competed in the game. After the intense competition, US, Yugoslavia, Argentina, and Uruguay entered the semi-finals, and the grand final was Argentina versus Uruguay. Uruguay ended up winning the game with 4-2, becoming the first World Cup champion. The ticket, as the eyewitness of the event, was viewed as a precious collection.
